plugin.name: Solao_Recall_Manager
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Build your own clickable travel/recall buttons for Aardwolf
plugin.description:
Recall Manager -- a miniwindow of clickable buttons you build yourself. Each button runs a list of commands separated by '|' (a pipe, NOT a semicolon -- Aardwolf's command stacking would split a ';' before this plugin sees it). Ships empty; nothing is assumed about your character.
recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...> add a button (quote multi-word names) recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...> change a button's commands recallmanager del <name> remove a button recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off> when that line is seen, set 'At:' to <name> recallmanager var <name> <value|off> define $name (an id, a clan, anything) recallmanager <name> fire a button (same as clicking it) recallmanager list | vars show buttons / vars recallmanager reset zero the counters recallmanager factoryreset confirm wipe ALL buttons + vars (no undo) recallmanager show/hide the window recallmanager help this
Vars: put $name in a command and it's replaced by the value you set. Define an id/keyword/clan once, reference it everywhere, change it in one place. Whatever $name means is up to you -- the plugin isn't opinionated about it.
Example (a held-item transport whose ids live in vars, + a plain recall): recallmanager var bag 67890 recallmanager var bus 12345 recallmanager var wep 55555 recallmanager add bus get $bus $bag|hold $bus|enter|dual $wep|put $bus $bag recallmanager at bus ^WHOOOOOOOOOOOOSH!$ recallmanager add recall recall

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize"
local win = GetPluginID() local cfg -- { ver, methods[], location, last, font, size }
-- title shown on the miniwindow header: "<display name> v<version>". Version is -- pulled from the plugin metadata (GetPluginInfo code 19) so it never drifts -- from the <plugin version="..."> header. Convention for all our UI plugins. local TITLE = "Recall Manager" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?" local function header () return TITLE .. " v" .. PVER end
-- verbs the dispatcher owns; can't be used as button names local RESERVED = { add=true, edit=true, del=true, delete=true, at=true, rename=true, list=true, reset=true, help=true, ["?"]=true, show=true, hide=true, var=true, vars=true, factoryreset=true, size=true, font=true, }
local function defaults () return { ver = 1, methods = {}, vars = {}, location = "?", last = "-", font = "Lucida Console", size = 9 } end
local COL = { bg = ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar = ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), btn = ColourNameToRGB("#1b2540"), hover = ColourNameToRGB("#274060"), text = ColourNameToRGB("#e6e6e6"), dim = ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent = ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), ok = ColourNameToRGB("#3ad07a"), border = ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), }
local PAD = 6 local MINW = 150 local hovered = nil local L = { width = MINW } -- computed layout: width, height, title_h, fh, row_h, foot_y, rows[name]=y local drag_x0, drag_y0, drag_size0 -- resize-grip drag state
local function find (name) -- case-insensitive; names may contain spaces if not name then return end local key = name:lower() for i, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do if m.name:lower() == key then return m, i end end end
-- pull a name off the front of a string. Quote it ('..' or "..") to allow spaces; -- otherwise it's the first whitespace-delimited token. Returns name, remainder. local function parse_name (s) s = (s or ""):gsub("^%s+", "") local q = s:sub(1, 1) if q == "'" or q == '"' then return s:match("^" .. q .. "([^" .. q .. "]*)" .. q .. "%s*(.*)$") end return s:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") end
local function repaint () WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") -- aard buffered repaint if present end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- runtime arrival triggers (one per method that defines an 'at' pattern) ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- sanitize: names may contain spaces, but trigger names must be tame local function trig_name (name) return "rm_at_" .. name:gsub("%W", "_") end
local function drop_trigger (name) DeleteTrigger(trig_name(name)) -- returns a code if absent; harmless end
local function make_trigger (m) if not m.at or m.at == "" then return end drop_trigger(m.name) AddTriggerEx(trig_name(m.name), m.at, "", trigger_flag.Enabled + trigger_flag.RegularExpression + trigger_flag.KeepEvaluating, -1, 0, "", "rm_arrived", sendto.script, 100) end
function rm_arrived (tname) -- global: named in AddTriggerEx -- match by trigger name (names sanitize lossily, so reverse-map by scanning) for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do if m.at and trig_name(m.name) == tname then cfg.location = m.name; paint(); return end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- layout: paint() draws pixels only; rebuild() changes the button SET -- (resize + hotspots). Splitting them keeps a hover repaint from tearing -- down the hotspot you're mid-click on. ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function apply_font () -- (re)load fonts at the current size WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0) end
-- everything (row height, width, height) derives from the font, so the whole UI -- scales when cfg.size changes -- that's what makes it responsive to a resize local function layout_metrics () L.fh = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 L.row_h = L.fh + 8 L.title_h = L.fh + PAD
local w = WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE) + WindowTextWidth(win, "f", " v"..PVER) if #cfg.methods == 0 then w = math.max(w, WindowTextWidth(win, "f", "recallmanager add <name> <cmds>")) end for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do w = math.max(w, WindowTextWidth(win, "f", m.name.." (99)")) -- name + gap + count end L.width = math.max(MINW, w + PAD*2 + 12)
L.rows = {} local y = L.title_h + PAD/2 if #cfg.methods == 0 then y = L.title_h + PAD + (L.fh + 2) + L.fh + PAD/2 else for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do L.rows[m.name] = y; y = y + L.row_h end y = y + PAD/2 end L.foot_y = y L.height = L.foot_y + (L.fh * 2) + PAD end
function paint () -- global so rm_arrived (defined above) can call it WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h, COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) WindowText(win, "f", " v"..PVER, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim)
if #cfg.methods == 0 then WindowText(win, "f", "No buttons yet.", PAD, L.title_h + PAD, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "f", "recallmanager add <name> <cmds>", PAD, L.title_h + PAD + L.fh + 2, 0, 0, COL.dim) else for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do local y = L.rows[m.name] local bot = y + L.row_h - 3 local bg = (hovered == "rm_"..m.name) and COL.hover or COL.btn WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, bot, bg) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, bot, COL.border) local ty = y + math.floor((L.row_h - L.fh) / 2) - 1 -- vertically centered WindowText(win, "f", m.name, PAD+5, ty, 0, 0, COL.text) -- name left-aligned local cnt = "("..(m.count or 0)..")" WindowText(win, "f", cnt, L.width-PAD-6-WindowTextWidth(win,"f",cnt), ty, 0, 0, COL.dim) -- count right-aligned end end
local ly = L.foot_y WindowText(win, "f", "At: ", PAD, ly, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "fb", cfg.location, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"f","At: "), ly, 0, 0, COL.ok) WindowText(win, "f", "Last: "..cfg.last, PAD, ly+L.fh+1, 0, 0, COL.dim)
-- resize grip: diagonal ticks in the bottom-right corner for i = 1, 3 do local o = i * 3 WindowLine(win, L.width-o-2, L.height-2, L.width-2, L.height-o-2, COL.dim, 0, 1) end
WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, L.width-1, L.height-1, COL.border) repaint() end
function rebuild () -- config/size changes: relayout + (re)build hotspots layout_metrics() WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) -- safe here: rebuild never runs mid-click for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do local ry = L.rows[m.name] WindowAddHotspot(win, "rm_"..m.name, PAD, ry, L.width-PAD, ry+L.row_h-3, "rm_over", "rm_out", "", "", "rm_click", m.name, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end -- resize grip hotspot (bottom-right corner), with a continuous drag handler local g = math.max(12, L.fh) WindowAddHotspot(win, "rm_resize", L.width-g, L.height-g, L.width, L.height, "", "", "rm_resize_down", "", "", "drag to resize", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win, "rm_resize", "rm_resize_move", "rm_resize_done", 0) movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h) -- re-add after DeleteAll paint() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- fire a button ---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- replace $name tokens with the current value from cfg.vars (define a value once -- -- an item id, a clan name, anything -- and every button using $name updates -- when you change it) local function subst (cmd) return (cmd:gsub("%$([%w_]+)", function (k) local v = cfg.vars[k] if v == nil then ColourNote("orange","","Recall Manager: undefined var '$"..k.."'. Set it: recallmanager var "..k.." <value>") return "$"..k end return v end)) end
local function fire (m) -- commands are '|'-separated, NOT ';': with command stacking on, a typed ';' -- would be split by the client before this plugin ever sees it for c in (m.cmds or ""):gmatch("[^|]+") do Send((subst(c):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$",""))) end m.count = (m.count or 0) + 1 cfg.last = m.name cfg.location = m.name -- optimistic; an 'at' trigger refines it on arrival paint() end
function rm_click (flags, id) local m = find((id:gsub("^rm_", ""))) if m then fire(m) end end function rm_over (flags, id) if hovered ~= id then hovered = id; paint() end end function rm_out (flags, id) if hovered == id then hovered = nil; paint() end end
-- resize grip: drag toward the bottom-right to grow the font (whole UI scales), -- back toward the top-left to shrink. Layout is font-driven so it stays responsive. function rm_resize_down (flags, id) -- 17/18 = current mouse screen position; baseline for the movement delta drag_x0, drag_y0, drag_size0 = WindowInfo(win, 17), WindowInfo(win, 18), cfg.size end function rm_resize_move (flags, id) local dx = WindowInfo(win, 17) - (drag_x0 or 0) local dy = WindowInfo(win, 18) - (drag_y0 or 0) local ns = math.max(6, math.min(28, (drag_size0 or cfg.size) + math.floor(((dx+dy)/2)/7 + 0.5))) if ns ~= cfg.size then cfg.size = ns apply_font() layout_metrics() WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) -- resize + repaint, but DON'T rebuild paint() -- (would delete the live grip hotspot) end SetCursor(miniwin.cursor_hand) end function rm_resize_done (flags, id) rebuild() -- now safe: re-add button hotspots at their new positions + re-arm grip SaveState() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- command dispatcher ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function help () ColourNote("cyan","",header().." -- build your own travel buttons") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...> add a button (| separates cmds)") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...> change its commands") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager del <name> remove it") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off> arrival line -> sets 'At:'") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager var <name> <value|off> define $name for use in commands") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager <name> fire it (same as clicking)") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager size <6-28> | font <name> resize / restyle") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager list | vars | reset | show | hide") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager factoryreset confirm wipe ALL buttons + vars") ColourNote("silver","","use $name in a command to insert a var (e.g. get $bus $bag)") ColourNote("silver","","quote multi-word button names: recallmanager add 'Clan Hall' recall") ColourNote("silver","","drag the bottom-right grip to resize the window") end
local function list () if #cfg.methods == 0 then ColourNote("silver","","No buttons yet. recallmanager add <name> <cmds>") return end for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do ColourNote("cyan","",m.name.." ("..(m.count or 0)..")") ColourNote("silver",""," cmds: "..(m.cmds or "")) if m.at and m.at ~= "" then ColourNote("silver",""," at: "..m.at) end end end
local function valid_name (n) -- letters/digits/space/underscore/hyphen; not a reserved word return n ~= nil and n ~= "" and n:match("^[%w][%w _%-]*$") ~= nil and not RESERVED[n:lower()] end
function rm_cmd (name, line, wildcards) local arg = (wildcards[1] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); repaint() end return end local lverb = arg:match("^(%S+)"):lower()
-- anything that isn't a management verb is a button name to fire (whole arg, -- spaces allowed; surrounding quotes optional) if not RESERVED[lverb] then local fname = arg:gsub("^(['\"])(.*)%1$", "%2") local m = find(fname) if m then fire(m) else ColourNote("orange","","Recall Manager: no button '"..fname.."'. Try 'recallmanager list' or 'recallmanager help'.") end return end
local rest = arg:match("^%S+%s*(.*)$") -- everything after the verb
if lverb == "help" or lverb == "?" then help() elseif lverb == "list" then list() elseif lverb == "show" then WindowShow(win, true); repaint() elseif lverb == "hide" then WindowShow(win, false) elseif lverb == "reset" then for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do m.count = 0 end cfg.last = "-"; paint() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: counters reset.")
elseif lverb == "factoryreset" then if rest:match("^%s*confirm%s*$") then for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do drop_trigger(m.name) end -- kill arrival triggers cfg = defaults() rebuild() SaveState() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: factory reset -- all buttons and vars cleared.") else ColourNote("orange","","This wipes ALL buttons and vars and cannot be undone.") ColourNote("orange","","Confirm with: recallmanager factoryreset confirm") end
elseif lverb == "add" then local n, cmds = parse_name(rest) if not valid_name(n) then ColourNote("orange","","Bad name. Letters/digits/space/_/- , not a reserved word. Quote multi-word names: recallmanager add 'Clan Hall' <cmd|cmd>") elseif not cmds or cmds == "" then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...>") elseif find(n) then ColourNote("orange","","'"..n.."' exists. Use: recallmanager edit "..n.." ...") else table.insert(cfg.methods, { name = n, cmds = cmds, count = 0 }) rebuild() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: added "..n.." = "..cmds) end
elseif lverb == "edit" then local n, cmds = parse_name(rest) local m = find(n) if not m or not cmds or cmds == "" then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...>") else m.cmds = cmds ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..m.name.." = "..cmds) end
elseif lverb == "del" or lverb == "delete" then local n = parse_name(rest) local m, i = find(n) if not m then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager del <name>") else drop_trigger(m.name) table.remove(cfg.methods, i) rebuild() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: removed "..m.name) end
elseif lverb == "at" then local n, pat = parse_name(rest) local m = find(n) if not m or not pat or pat == "" then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off>") elseif pat == "off" then m.at = nil; drop_trigger(m.name) ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..m.name.." arrival cleared") else m.at = pat; make_trigger(m) ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..m.name.." arrival = "..pat) end
elseif lverb == "var" then local n, v = rest:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") if not n or not n:match("^[%w_]+$") then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager var <name> <value|off> (name is one word; reference as $name)") elseif v == "off" then cfg.vars[n] = nil ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: cleared $"..n) else cfg.vars[n] = v ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: $"..n.." = "..v) end
elseif lverb == "vars" then if not next(cfg.vars) then ColourNote("silver","","No vars. recallmanager var <name> <value>") else for k, v in pairs(cfg.vars) do ColourNote("silver",""," $"..k.." = "..v) end end
elseif lverb == "size" then local n = tonumber(rest:match("%d+")) if not n then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager size <6-28> (or drag the bottom-right grip)") else cfg.size = math.max(6, math.min(28, n)) apply_font(); rebuild(); SaveState() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: font size "..cfg.size) end
elseif lverb == "font" then local f = rest:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if f == "" then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager font <font name> (current: "..cfg.font..")") else cfg.font = f apply_font(); rebuild(); SaveState() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: font "..cfg.font) end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end cfg.methods = cfg.methods or {} cfg.vars = cfg.vars or {} end end
windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_right, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = rm_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 120 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, MINW, 30, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) apply_font()
for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do make_trigger(m) end rebuild() WindowShow(win, true) end
function rm_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then local r = WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Bring to Front|Send to Back|-|Hide|Reset counters") if r == "Bring to Front" then CallPlugin("462b665ecb569efbf261422f", "boostMe", win) elseif r == "Send to Back" then CallPlugin("462b665ecb569efbf261422f", "dropMe", win) elseif r == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) elseif r == "Reset counters" then for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do m.count = 0 end cfg.last = "-"; paint() end end end
function OnPluginSaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end
function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false) WindowDelete(win) end
